name: Mainsail
description: Control and monitor your printer from everywhere, from any device
compose:
name: slashnode-mainsail
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/mainsail-crew/mainsail:v2.18.0
    container_name: mainsail
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data-config.json:/usr/share/nginx/html/config.json:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8070:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config.json:
    name: slashnode-mainsail_web_data-config.json
